videos.headline: OK State's Rudolph evades rush, finds WR for 69-yard TD
videos.description: Cowboys QB Mason Rudolph breaks away from the pass rush, and connects with Marcell Ateman, who tiptoes down the sideline to score a 69-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: OKST's Rudolph records five passing TDs in 1st half
videos.description: Oklahoma State QB Mason Rudolph turned in an impressive first half against Pittsburgh by throwing five touchdown passes and racking up 423 total passing yards.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (OKST's Rudolph records five passing TDs in 1st half) 2017/9/16 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: Oklahoma State on the board with Hill's scamper
videos.description: Justice Hill follows his blockers and bursts through a big hole for a 20-yard touchdown run.

videos.headline: Stoner gets open, breaks tackle for long Cowboys TD
videos.description: Oklahoma State QB Mason Rudolph finds a wide-open Dillon Stoner, who eludes the last defender to score from 54 yards out.

videos.headline: Pitt's Henderson breaks free for 74-yard gain
videos.description: Panthers QB Ben Dinucci dumps it off to Quadree Henderson who runs down the sideline for Pitt's biggest pickup of the day.

videos.headline: Washington makes acrobatic catch in traffic
videos.description: Cowboys WR James Washington jumps up and makes a contested grab for a 31-yard gain.

videos.headline: Panthers' Araujo-Lopes eludes defenders and leaps into end zone
videos.description: Pittsburgh scores just before the half, with QB Ben Dinucci finding Rafael Araujo-Lopes who breaks tackles and jumps into the end zone for a 14-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Rudolph's 3rd TD pass of half gives Cowboys big lead
videos.description: Oklahoma State QB Mason Rudolph stays hot, finding Jalen McCleskey in the end zone for an eight-yard touchdown, giving the Cowboys a 28-0 lead.

videos.headline: Rudolph connects with McCleskey as OK State pours it on
videos.description: Mason Rudolph tosses his fourth touchdown of the half, finding Jalen McCleskey for a 40-yard score.

videos.headline: Moss pounds it in for Panthers' first score
videos.description: Chawntez Moss runs it up the gut, taking defenders with him into the end zone on a 5-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Cowboys' Hill weaves through defense on impressive TD run
videos.description: Justice Hill runs for his second touchdown of the half, eluding multiple Pitt defenders and scoring from 15 yards out.

videos.headline: OK State's Rudolph throws 5th TD of half
videos.description: Mason Rudolph continues to light up the Pittsburgh defense, connecting with Jalen McCleskey for a 48-yard touchdown, giving the Cowboys a 49-7 lead.

videos.headline: OK State scores on pick-six
videos.description: Justin Philips gets an interception on a deflected pass and returns it 10 yards for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Pitt scores on botched OK State punt
videos.description: Oklahoma State's snap sails high, and the punter whiffs on his attempt to kick the ball out of the end zone, allowing Pitt to fall on it for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Cowboys' Wallace makes lunging one-handed grab
videos.description: Tylan Wallace stretches out with one hand and makes an impressive catch for a 39-yard Oklahoma State gain.

videos.headline: Coach Gundy pleased with Cowboys' first-half performance
videos.description: With a 49-14 lead at halftime, Oklahoma State head coach Mike Gundy wants to see more of the same from his team in the second half.
